server/src/image_tool/service.py :: convert_image
def convert_image(
    data: bytes,
    source_name: str | None,
    format_name: str | None,
    max_mb: float | int | str | None = None,
    edits: EditOptions | None = None,
    strip_metadata: bool = True,
    apply_orientation: bool = True,
    preset_name: str | None = None,
) -> tuple[bytes, OutputFormat]:
    preset = None
    if preset_name:
        preset = get_preset(preset_name)
        format_name = preset.format
        max_mb = preset.max_mb
        strip_metadata = preset.strip_metadata
        apply_orientation = preset.apply_orientation
        edits = merge_edits(preset, edits)

    output_format = parse_output_format(format_name)
    if output_format is None:
        raise ConversionError("Invalid output format.", status_code=400)
    if not data:
        raise ConversionError("No file uploaded.", status_code=400)

    try:
        raster = load_raster_from_bytes(
            data,
            source_name,
            strip_metadata=strip_metadata,
            apply_orientation=apply_orientation,
        )
        if preset is not None:
            raster = apply_preset_resize(raster, preset)
        if edits is not None:
            raster = apply_edits(raster,
